site.welcomeText: Your digital guest guide — everything you need during your stay in the beautiful Lefkada!

navCards.title: Neighborhood
navCards.subtitle: Supermarket, pharmacy, ATM, bakery and fuel.

wifi.title: Πληροφορίες WiFi
wifi.notes: The router is in the living room next to the TV. There is also an NFC option to connect. Restart if needed.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.keybox: Keybox located by the main entrance next to the mailbox.
accommodation.map: Use the address in your booking confirmation for navigation.
accommodation.checkout: Please check-out by 11:00. Leave used towels in the bathroom and place keys in the keybox.
accommodation.late_checkout: Late check-out may be available upon request and subject to availability. Contact host in advance to arrange.
accommodation.air_condition: The AC remote is in the living room drawer. Recommended setting: 24–26°C for comfort and energy savings.
accommodation.bbq: If you need a BBQ setup, contact the host in advance so it can be provided and prepared.
accommodation.water: Tap water is not drinkable. Please use bottled water for drinking.
accommodation.hot_water: Hot water is available 24h assisted by solar heating. On cloudy days heating may be reduced.
accommodation.breakfast: Some basic breakfast items (coffee, tea, bread, jams) are available in the kitchen.
accommodation.consumables: Please do not remove consumables except slippers, shampoos, breakfasts, chocolates.

house_rules.title: 📋 House Rules
rules: Dispose of recycling in labelled bins.

transport.title: Transportation
transport.info: Nearest bus stop is 8 minutes walk. Taxis and ride-hailing apps work reliably in the area.

restaurants.title: Restaurants & Cafes
restaurants.intro: Selected local restaurants and cafes nearby.

supermarket.title: Supermarket
supermarket.text: Several supermarkets are within 5–12 minutes by car. Use the map to find the closest one.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy
pharmacy.text: Pharmacies have variable opening hours; search on the map for the nearest open one.

atm.title: ATM
atm.text: ATMs are available in Lefkada Town and near supermarkets.

bakery.title: Bakery
bakery.text: Local bakeries offer fresh bread and pastries in the mornings.

gas.title: Gas Station
gas.text: Fuel stations are located on main roads around Lefkada.
